ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence */,
  "sequence_name" TEXT /* Name of the sequence */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* The genetic sequence itself */,
  "is_wild_type" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the sequence is the wild type */,
  "one_mismatch" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the sequence has a single mismatch */,
  "dist_from_wt" INTEGER /* Distance from the wild type sequence */,
  "sequence_length" INTEGER /* Length of the sequence */,
  "gc_content" REAL /* GC content of the sequence */,
  "insertion_rate" REAL /* Insertion rate of the sequence */,
  "deletion_rate" REAL /* Deletion rate of the sequence */,
  "mismatch_rate" REAL /* Mismatch rate of the sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the site is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the site on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the site on the chromosome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_counts" (
  "count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each count entry */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of the sequence at the site */,
  "corrected_count" INTEGER /* Corrected count of the sequence at the site */,
  "count_date" TEXT /* Date when the count was taken */,
  "count_type" TEXT /* Type of count (e.g., raw, corrected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_counts_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_counts_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "variant_description" TEXT /* Description of the variant */,
  "mismatch_positions" TEXT /* Positions of mismatches in the sequence */,
  "insertion_positions" TEXT /* Positions of insertions in the sequence */,
  "deletion_positions" TEXT /* Positions of deletions in the sequence */,
  "variant_type" TEXT /* Type of variant (e.g., SNP, indel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_analysis_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_analysis_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sequence */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequence was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_access_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_metadata_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., update, deletion) */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Details of the log entry */,
  "log_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_logs_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_logs_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alignment_results" (
  "alignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alignment result */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "alignment_score" INTEGER /* Score of the alignment */,
  "alignment_start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the alignment */,
  "alignment_end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the alignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alignment_results_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alignment_results_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Score of the quality metric */,
  "quality_metric" TEXT /* Type of quality metric (e.g., Phred score) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_quality_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)
